title: DeathSound Broadcast
description: Broadcast a sound to nearby players on player death by block range. Server-side support ❤️
body:
# DeathSound Broadcast Mod
Broadcast a sound to nearby players on player death by block range. Server-side support ❤️

## Features
- Broadcast sound when player death nearby.
- Config block range.
- Config death sound.

## Config

| Config | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `soundRangeInBlocks` | Integer | `100` | How far (in blocks) players can hear the death sound |
| `deathSound` | String | `minecraft:entity.wither.spawn` | Sound to play when a player dies |

<details>
  <summary>deathsoundbroadcast.toml</summary>
  
  ```toml
  soundRangeInBlocks = 100
  deathSound = "minecraft:entity.wither.spawn"
  ```
  
</details>
